name: Waxholm Space atlas of the Sprague Dawley rat brain (v4)

attributes.value: Waxholm Space atlas of the Sprague Dawley rat brain (v4)

Anatomical delineations of 222 brain regions and white matter tracts in the Sprague Dawley rat brain, based on a high resolution magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) volume. Version 4 contains 112 new and 56 updated delineations related or adjacent to the basal ganglia, thalamus and cortical structures. 54 delineations have remained unchanged and 9 have been completely replaced relative to v3.
